commands.commands: Lists all enabled built-in and custom commands active in your channel.
commands.bot: Shows information about the bot developer and a link to the BotOfTheSpecter website.
commands.roadmap: Posts a link to the public Trello board showing upcoming features and development plans.
commands.quote: Retrieves a random quote, or a specific one by number if provided.
commands.rps: Play Rock-Paper-Scissors against Specter. Specter picks randomly — may the best hand win!
commands.story: Kicks off a collaborative AI-generated story in chat. Each use continues the tale.
commands.roulette: Spin the roulette wheel in chat for a random outcome.
commands.songrequest: Adds a song to the Spotify queue. Accepts a song title, artist name, Spotify link, or YouTube link. Requires Spotify to be linked in the dashboard.
commands.songqueue: Displays the current Spotify song request queue. Requires Spotify to be linked in the dashboard.
commands.skipsong: Skips the currently playing song in the Spotify request queue.
commands.watchtime: Shows how long you have been watching the current stream session.
commands.stoptimer: Stops your currently active countdown timer before it ends.
commands.checktimer: Shows how much time is remaining on your active countdown timer.
commands.version: Displays the current running version of BotOfTheSpecter.
commands.convert: Converts between currencies using live exchange rates, or between physical units such as length, weight, temperature, speed, and volume.
commands.subathon: Manages a subathon countdown timer. Mods can start, stop, pause, resume, add time, or check the current status.
commands.todo: Manages the stream to-do list. Tasks are public by default; add the word private to keep a task hidden from chat. Mod-only for add, edit, remove, and complete actions.
commands.todolist: Posts the top 5 public to-do list tasks directly in chat.
commands.kill: Simulates a fun in-chat kill action targeting a mentioned user.
commands.points: Shows the current bot point balance for yourself or a mentioned user.
commands.slots: Pulls the slot machine lever and displays a randomised result in chat.
commands.timer: Starts a personal countdown timer. Defaults to 5 minutes if no duration is given. Specter will ping you in chat when time is up.
commands.game: Shows the game or category the channel is currently streaming.
commands.gamble: Gamble your bot points on coinflip, blackjack, or roulette. Specify the game type and a bet amount.
commands.joke: Tells a random joke in chat.
commands.ping: Checks Specter's connection to the internet and returns the response time.
commands.weather: Fetches current weather conditions for a specified city or location.
commands.time: Displays the current time in a given IANA timezone (e.g. America/New_York). Defaults to UTC if no timezone is provided.
commands.song: Shows the currently playing song via Spotify (if linked) or Shazam (premium users only).
commands.translate: Auto-detects the language of the provided text and translates it to English.
commands.cheerleader: Displays the user who has cheered the most bits in the channel of all time.
commands.steam: Looks up the currently streamed game on Steam and posts its store details in chat.
commands.schedule: Posts the channel's streaming schedule and upcoming events.
commands.mybits: Shows your total bits cheered and recent cheer stats for this channel.
commands.lurk: Marks you as lurking so the streamer knows you're watching silently in the background.
commands.unlurk: Removes your lurk status and announces your return to chat.
commands.lurking: Lets chat know you are still lurking.
commands.lurklead: Shows the user who has spent the most total time lurking in the channel.
commands.userslurking: Shows how many users are currently marked as lurking.
commands.clip: Creates a clip of the last 30 seconds of the stream and posts the link in chat.
commands.subscription: Shows your current Twitch subscription tier for this channel.
commands.hug: Sends a virtual hug to a mentioned chatter.
commands.highfive: Gives a virtual high-five to a mentioned chatter.
commands.kiss: Sends a playful virtual kiss to a mentioned chatter.
commands.uptime: Shows how long the stream has been live in the current session.
commands.typo: Increments the typo counter for yourself or a mentioned user by one.
commands.typos: Displays the total typo count for yourself or a mentioned user.
commands.followage: Shows how long you or a mentioned user has been following the channel.
commands.deaths: Shows the current in-game death count for the stream session.
commands.heartrate: Displays the streamer's live heart rate. Requires a HypeRate code to be configured in the dashboard.
commands.puzzles: Shows the current puzzle completion stats for the stream session.
commands.addcommand: Creates a new custom command with the given name and response text.
commands.removecommand: Permanently deletes a custom command from the bot.
commands.editcommand: Updates the response text of an existing custom command.
commands.enablecommand: Enables a disabled built-in or custom command so it responds in chat again.
commands.disablecommand: Disables a built-in or custom command so it no longer responds in chat.
commands.removetypos: Decreases the typo count for a mentioned user by the specified amount. Defaults to 1 if no amount is given.
commands.addpoints: Awards a specified number of bot points to a mentioned user.
commands.removepoints: Deducts a specified number of bot points from a mentioned user.
commands.permit: Grants a user a temporary permission bypass for link posting or other restricted actions.
commands.removequote: Permanently deletes a specific quote from the quote list by its number.
commands.quoteadd: Adds a new quote to the channel's quote list.
commands.settitle: Updates the stream title to the provided text.
commands.setgame: Changes the current stream category to the specified game or category name.
commands.edittypos: Sets the typo count for a mentioned user to a specific number.
commands.deathadd: Adds to the in-game death count. Defaults to +1 if no amount is given.
commands.deathremove: Subtracts from the in-game death count to correct mistakes. Defaults to -1 if no amount is given.
commands.shoutout: Sends a shoutout message in chat for a mentioned user, including their last played game.
commands.marker: Places a named marker in the VOD at the current timestamp, useful for finding highlights later.
commands.checkupdate: Checks whether a newer version of BotOfTheSpecter is available.
commands.startlotto: Generates the winning lottery numbers to begin a lotto round.
commands.drawlotto: Draws and announces lotto winners based on how closely their numbers match the winning set. Awards points by division.
commands.wsstatus: Checks and reports the current WebSocket server connection status for this channel.
commands.dbstatus: Checks and reports the database connection status and connection uptime.
commands.forceonline: Manually sets the bot's internal stream status to online, bypassing the Twitch event. Use if the bot missed the stream going live.
commands.forceoffline: Manually sets the bot's internal stream status to offline, bypassing the Twitch event. Use if the bot missed the stream ending.
commands.obs: Triggers an OBS event via the BotOfTheSpecter OBS Connector app. Can also switch to a named scene.
commands.createraffle: Creates and schedules a new raffle with a name, prize, and number of winners. Add weighted to give subscribers and VIPs better odds. Start it when ready with !startraffle.
commands.startraffle: Starts the next scheduled raffle, or a specific one by ID. Viewers can then enter with !joinraffle.
commands.joinraffle: Enters you into the currently running raffle.
commands.leaveraffle: Removes you from the currently running raffle.
commands.stopraffle: Ends the active raffle immediately without drawing any winners.
commands.drawraffle: Draws and announces the raffle winner(s) from all current entries. Optionally specify a raffle ID to draw a specific one.
